tokenization_failed_authentication_alert: It looks like there was a problem with the bank authorisation. You can try with another card or find more information in the Help section
We're sorry, we could not save the card.
token_authn_mit_term_explanation:
We need you to authorise the payment of this order, including possible changes you may make to it and products with variable weight.
By authorising, you allow us to charge the final amount on the delivery day, in accordance with the payment conditions.
token_authn_not_confirmed_alert_explanat: We need you to authorise the card payment to be able to confirm your order.
token_authn_reminder: Once the purchase is completed you will be able to modify your order at no cost until the day before delivery.

tooltip.price_message: For products sold by weight, the amount charged will be adjusted to the quantity served. Charging of the final amount will be made after the preparation of your order.

whats_new_subtitle: Repeat your order from the home screen
ymex_description: It records data on the visitor’s behaviour on the website. This is used for the internal analysis and optimisation of the website.
yuidss_description: It collects information about the visitor’s behaviour on multiple websites. This information is used on the website to optimise the relevance of the advertising.
_gaexp_description: It is used to determine a user’s inclusion in an experiment and the expiration of the experiments in which are participating.
_gaexp_expiration: It depends on the duration of the experiment, but it is usually 90 days.
_ga_description: This cookie is used to distinguish unique users by assigning a randomly generated number as the customer identifier. It is included in every page request on a site and is used to calculate visitor, session and campaign data for analytics reports on the sites.
_gid_description: It is used to distinguish between users.
__mo_ca_description: This cookie is used to store cookies consent for the platform
__mo_da_description: This cookie is used to store user information related to the warehouse and the postal code
__mo_ui_description: This cookie is used to store the user’s language preferences
__zlcmid_description: This cookie is used to identify the user's device and for the proper functioning of the help chat.
